prompt: I want to make an Ironsworn character. She's a former soldier who left her war-band after a battle went wrong. I'm thinking something with iron as her highest stat, maybe a sword, and she has a hound. For her background vow, she wants to find the commander who betrayed her unit.

assertions.description: assets array contains an asset named 'Swordmaster'
assets array contains an asset named 'Hound'
stats sum to exactly 9 (3+2+2+1+1) and each is between 1 and 3
progressTracks contains exactly two vow-kind tracks (background vow + inciting incident)
the background vow progress track has rank 'epic'
background vow text references betrayal, commander, or unit in some way
transcript shows GM addressed: name, stats, resources, assets, background vow, inciting incident
